title: Perform Full Replacement Of The Z-Axis Cable Carrier
summary: Replace the Z-axis cable carrier while retaining the existing air line and FFC, then verify the carrier is correctly reinstalled and restart the operator station.
when_to_use: Use when performing the documented full replacement of the Z-axis cable carrier on the tipper, while preserving and reinstalling the existing air line and flat-flex cable (FFC), followed by inspection and operator station restart.
not_for: Do not use for general operator execution.
Do not use if lockout/tagout cannot be completed using the referenced Operator Station Lockout/Tagout procedure.
Do not continue if the FFC clamps cannot remain identifiable or cannot be realigned to the earlier marks.
Do not use as a procedure for replacing the air line or FFC themselves; this source-specific procedure preserves and reinstalls the existing air line and FFC.

responsibilities: Perform lockout/tagout using the referenced procedure.
Remove panels and hardware as needed to access the cable carrier.
Mark, preserve, remove, reinstall, and inspect the air line, FFC clamps, and cable carrier.
Restart the operator station using the referenced procedure.
Provide access to the station or assist under L2 support direction when needed.

safety_notes: This procedure includes lockout/tagout and component replacement.
The procedure is not support-safe for general operator execution.
Stop if lockout/tagout cannot be completed using the referenced procedure.
Stop if dividers press on the FFC, cross bars do not close, joints are not fully seated, or the carrier does not appear uniform end to end.
access_or_tools_needed: Tooling to remove and install M3 socket-head screws
Tooling to remove and install M3 flat-head fasteners
Access to the station side panel and cable carrier ends

access_required: Access to the station side panel and cable carrier ends
system_preconditions: Tipper is locked out/tagged out using the referenced Operator Station Lockout/Tagout procedure before replacement work begins.

visual_references.description: Routing reference for side-panel access and cable path context during tipper service.
Reference for FFC clamp hardware and M3 socket-head screw context.
Reference for cable carrier routing, divider placement, and cross-bar closure context.
Reference for marking and tie-removal context around cable carrier service.
Reference for side-panel removal context during tipper cable service.

steps.title: Lock out and tag out the tipper
steps.purpose: Place the equipment in a safe maintenance state before accessing or replacing the cable carrier.
steps.instruction: LOTO the tipper using the referenced Operator Station Lockout/Tagout procedure.
steps.expected_result: The tipper is locked out and tagged out per the referenced procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: Energy isolation has been completed and maintenance can proceed under the referenced LOTO procedure.
steps.failure_condition: LOTO cannot be completed or verified using the referenced procedure.

actions.label: Perform LOTO
actions.exact_action: LOTO the tipper using the referenced Operator Station Lockout/Tagout procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: Lockout/tagout cannot be completed using the referenced procedure.

steps.title: Remove the station side panel if needed
steps.purpose: Gain access to the motor and cable carrier service area.
steps.instruction: If necessary, use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket to remove the nine self-tapping screws securing the side panel, then remove the station side panel to access the motor.
steps.expected_result: The side panel is removed when needed and access to the service area is available.
steps.healthy_condition: The motor and cable carrier service area are accessible.
steps.failure_condition: The side panel cannot be removed or access to the service area remains obstructed.

actions.label: Remove side panel screws
actions.exact_action: Use a 3/8-in. wrench or socket to remove the nine self-tapping screws securing the side panel.

actions.label: Remove side panel
actions.exact_action: Remove the station side panel to access the motor.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Maintenance diagram context for side-panel access and routing area during tipper service.
Related maintenance figure showing side-panel removal context during cable service.

stop_or_escalate_if: The side panel cannot be removed as needed to access the service area.

steps.title: Mark the air line and FFC positions
steps.purpose: Preserve the original routing and clamp positions for correct reinstallation.
steps.instruction: Mark the air line and FFC at both ends where they enter and exit the cable carrier using a marker or tape.
steps.expected_result: Reference marks are present at both ends for the air line and FFC.
steps.healthy_condition: The air line and FFC positions are clearly identifiable for later alignment.
steps.failure_condition: The positions are not clearly marked or cannot be identified later during reassembly.

actions.label: Mark air line and FFC
actions.exact_action: Mark the air line and FFC at both ends where they enter and exit the cable carrier using a marker or tape.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related cable carrier service context for marking where the cable enters the carrier on both ends.

stop_or_escalate_if: The air line and FFC positions cannot be clearly marked or preserved for reinstallation.

steps.title: Document and release the air line ties
steps.purpose: Free the air line from the old cable carrier while preserving its original tie arrangement.
steps.instruction: Note how the air line is tied to the cable carrier and cut the wire ties.
steps.expected_result: The air line tie arrangement has been noted and the wire ties have been removed.
steps.healthy_condition: The air line is free from the old carrier and its prior tie locations are understood for reinstallation.
steps.failure_condition: The tie arrangement is not documented or the air line cannot be freed without uncertainty.

actions.label: Note tie arrangement
actions.exact_action: Note how the air line is tied to the cable carrier.

actions.label: Cut wire ties
actions.exact_action: Cut the wire ties.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related cable carrier service context showing documentation and cutting of cable ties at both ends.

stop_or_escalate_if: The original tie arrangement cannot be determined well enough to restore the air line position.

steps.title: Remove the FFC clamp screws
steps.purpose: Release the FFC from the cable carrier ends without losing clamp orientation.
steps.instruction: At both ends of the cable carrier, remove the M3 socket-head screws holding the FFC clamps in place. Keep the clamps on the FFC if possible.
steps.expected_result: The FFC clamps are released from both ends of the cable carrier.
steps.healthy_condition: The clamps remain associated with the FFC and can be realigned later.
steps.failure_condition: The clamps cannot remain identifiable on the FFC or their positions become uncertain.

actions.label: Remove FFC clamp screws
actions.exact_action: At both ends of the cable carrier, remove the M3 socket-head screws holding the FFC clamps in place.

actions.label: Retain clamps on FFC
actions.exact_action: Keep the clamps on the FFC if possible.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: FFC clamp hardware and M3 socket-head screw context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The FFC clamps do not remain identifiable or cannot be realigned to the earlier marks.

steps.title: Detach the old cable carrier from both ends
steps.purpose: Release the old cable carrier from its mounting points for removal.
steps.instruction: Detach the cable carrier by removing the four M3 screws at both ends of the cable carrier.
steps.expected_result: The cable carrier is detached from both ends.
steps.healthy_condition: All end fasteners are removed and the carrier is free to be taken off the air line and FFC.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier remains secured or cannot be detached cleanly from one or both ends.

actions.label: Remove carrier end screws
actions.exact_action: Remove the four M3 screws at both ends of the cable carrier.

stop_or_escalate_if: The cable carrier cannot be detached from both ends.

steps.title: Remove the old cable carrier from the air line and FFC
steps.purpose: Separate the old carrier from the retained air line and FFC.
steps.instruction: Open all cross bars on the outside of the cable carrier and remove the carrier from the FFC and air line; one end of the cable carrier may need to be snapped off to fully remove it.
steps.expected_result: The old cable carrier is removed from the retained air line and FFC.
steps.healthy_condition: The old carrier is fully removed and the air line and FFC remain available for reuse.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier cannot be removed, or removal leaves uncertainty about reuse and routing of the retained components.

actions.label: Open cross bars
actions.exact_action: Open all cross bars on the outside of the cable carrier.

actions.label: Remove old carrier
actions.exact_action: Remove the carrier from the FFC and air line; one end of the cable carrier may need to be snapped off to fully remove it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related cable carrier context for opening snap-open cross bars during removal.

stop_or_escalate_if: The old carrier cannot be removed without losing control of the retained air line or FFC routing.

steps.title: Prepare the new cable carrier
steps.purpose: Open the new carrier so the retained air line and FFC can be installed into it.
steps.instruction: Open all cross bars on the new cable carrier and probably one end.
steps.expected_result: The new cable carrier is open and ready for installation around the retained components.
steps.healthy_condition: Cross bars are open and the carrier is ready to accept the air line and FFC.
steps.failure_condition: The new carrier cannot be opened as needed for installation.

actions.label: Open new carrier
actions.exact_action: Open all cross bars on the new cable carrier and probably one end.

stop_or_escalate_if: The new cable carrier cannot be opened or prepared for installation.

steps.title: Position the new carrier and dividers
steps.purpose: Set the new carrier in place and establish divider position before closing it around the retained components.
steps.instruction: Put the new cable carrier roughly in place while positioning the internal dividers all the way to one side, against the air line.
steps.expected_result: The new carrier is roughly positioned and the dividers are set against the air line side.
steps.healthy_condition: The carrier is in place for closure and the dividers are positioned to separate the air line from the FFC.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier or dividers cannot be positioned as required.

actions.label: Position carrier and dividers
actions.exact_action: Put the new cable carrier roughly in place while positioning the internal dividers all the way to one side, against the air line.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related installation context showing cable carrier routing and divider placement between cable and air line.

stop_or_escalate_if: The dividers cannot be positioned to keep separation between the air line and FFC.

steps.title: Close the carrier and verify divider clearance
steps.purpose: Secure the new carrier around the retained components without pinching or loading the FFC.
steps.instruction: Snap all cross bars closed, ensuring none of the dividers are pressing on the FFC, and snap the end back on if necessary.
steps.expected_result: The carrier is closed and the FFC is not being pressed by the dividers.
steps.healthy_condition: All cross bars are closed and divider placement does not press on the FFC.
steps.failure_condition: Dividers press on the FFC, cross bars do not close, or the end cannot be snapped back on as needed.

actions.label: Close cross bars
actions.exact_action: Snap all cross bars closed.

actions.label: Verify divider clearance
actions.exact_action: Ensure none of the dividers are pressing on the FFC.

actions.label: Reattach end if needed
actions.exact_action: Snap the end back on if necessary.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related installation context for closing cross bars and maintaining divider separation between cable and air line.

stop_or_escalate_if: Dividers press on the FFC.
Cross bars do not close.
The carrier end cannot be restored as needed.

steps.title: Mount both ends of the new cable carrier
steps.purpose: Secure the new cable carrier to its mounting points.
steps.instruction: Mount both ends using four M3 flat-head fasteners.
steps.expected_result: Both ends of the new cable carrier are mounted.
steps.healthy_condition: The carrier is mechanically secured at both ends.
steps.failure_condition: One or both ends cannot be secured with the required fasteners.

actions.label: Install carrier fasteners
actions.exact_action: Mount both ends using four M3 flat-head fasteners.

stop_or_escalate_if: The carrier cannot be secured at both ends.

steps.title: Reattach the FFC clamps to the new carrier
steps.purpose: Restore the FFC clamp positions at both ends of the cable carrier.
steps.instruction: Attach the FFC clamps using the M3 socket-head screws at both cable carrier ends, ensuring the FFC clamps align with the marks made earlier.
steps.expected_result: The FFC clamps are reattached and aligned to the earlier marks.
steps.healthy_condition: Clamp positions match the earlier marks and the FFC is retained at both ends.
steps.failure_condition: The clamps cannot be aligned to the earlier marks or cannot be secured properly.

actions.label: Install FFC clamps
actions.exact_action: Attach the FFC clamps using the M3 socket-head screws at both cable carrier ends.

actions.label: Align to marks
actions.exact_action: Ensure the FFC clamps align with the marks made earlier.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: FFC clamp hardware and M3 socket-head screw context for clamp reattachment.

stop_or_escalate_if: The FFC clamps do not remain identifiable or cannot be realigned to the earlier marks.

steps.title: Reposition and tie the air line
steps.purpose: Restore the air line to its original position within the new cable carrier.
steps.instruction: Position the air line in the cable carrier using the earlier marks and wire tie it in place.
steps.expected_result: The air line is positioned according to the earlier marks and secured with wire ties.
steps.healthy_condition: The air line is secured in the carrier in the intended position.
steps.failure_condition: The air line cannot be aligned to the earlier marks or cannot be secured in place.

actions.label: Position air line
actions.exact_action: Position the air line in the cable carrier using the earlier marks.

actions.label: Tie air line in place
actions.exact_action: Wire tie it in place.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related installation context for securing retained components with wire ties at cable carrier ends.

stop_or_escalate_if: The air line cannot be restored to the earlier marked position.
The air line cannot be secured in place.

steps.title: Inspect the installed cable carrier
steps.purpose: Verify the new cable carrier is fully closed, properly seated, and not loading the FFC.
steps.instruction: Inspect the cable carrier to ensure all cross bars are closed, the dividers are not pressing on the FFC, and all cable carrier joints are fully seated; the cable carrier should look uniform end to end.
steps.expected_result: The installed cable carrier passes visual inspection.
steps.healthy_condition: All cross bars are closed, dividers are clear of the FFC, joints are fully seated, and the carrier looks uniform end to end.
steps.failure_condition: Any cross bar is open, any divider presses on the FFC, any joint is not fully seated, or the carrier does not look uniform end to end.

actions.label: Inspect carrier closure
actions.exact_action: Ensure all cross bars are closed.

actions.label: Inspect divider clearance
actions.exact_action: Ensure the dividers are not pressing on the FFC.

actions.label: Inspect joint seating
actions.exact_action: Ensure all cable carrier joints are fully seated.

actions.label: Inspect overall uniformity
actions.exact_action: Ensure the cable carrier looks uniform end to end.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Related installation context for cross-bar closure and internal separation of cable and air line.

stop_or_escalate_if: Dividers press on the FFC.
Cross bars do not close.
Joints are not fully seated.
The carrier does not appear uniform end to end.

steps.title: Reinstall side panels if needed
steps.purpose: Restore guarding or covers removed for access.
steps.instruction: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.
steps.expected_result: Any removed side panels are reinstalled.
steps.healthy_condition: Panels are back in place as needed after service.

actions.label: Reinstall panels
actions.exact_action: Reinstall the top and/or bottom side panels, if necessary.

stop_or_escalate_if: Required panels cannot be reinstalled.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the station to service using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.instruction: Restart the operator station using the referenced Starting The Operator Station procedure.
steps.expected_result: The operator station is restarted per the referenced procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station restart procedure has been completed.
steps.failure_condition: The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure.

actions.label: Restart station
actions.exact_action: Restart the operator station using the referenced Starting The Operator Station procedure.

stop_or_escalate_if: The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure.

success_criteria: The new Z-axis cable carrier is installed.
The existing air line and FFC are correctly positioned using the earlier marks.
FFC clamps are reattached and aligned to the earlier marks.
Dividers are not pressing on the FFC.
All cable carrier joints are fully seated.
The cable carrier looks uniform end to end.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced procedure.
healthy_conditions: The tipper is safely locked out/tagged out before maintenance begins.
The side panel is removed only as needed for access.
The air line and FFC positions remain identifiable through marking.
The FFC clamps remain associated with the FFC and can be realigned.
The new cable carrier is secured at both ends.
The air line is wire-tied in place.
The installed cable carrier appears uniform end to end.
failure_conditions: LOTO cannot be completed using the referenced procedure.
The FFC clamps do not remain identifiable or cannot be realigned to the earlier marks.
Cable carrier joints are not fully seated.
The cable carrier does not appear uniform end to end.
The operator station cannot be restarted using the referenced procedure.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate if lockout/tagout cannot be completed using the referenced Operator Station Lockout/Tagout procedure.
Stop and escalate if the FFC clamps cannot remain identifiable or cannot be realigned to the earlier marks.
Stop and escalate if dividers press on the FFC, cross bars do not close, joints are not fully seated, or the carrier does not appear uniform end to end.
Escalate to appropriate maintenance/engineering support if the new cable carrier cannot be mounted or restored to a uniform installed condition.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Routing reference for side-panel access and cable path context during service.
FFC clamp hardware and M3 socket-head screw context.
Cable carrier routing, divider placement, and cross-bar closure context.
Marking and tie-removal context around cable carrier service.
Related side-panel removal context during cable service.

No explicit PPE list is provided in the packet for this specific procedure.
No explicit torque values or fastener torque requirements are provided in the packet.
